summary: Comprehensive Stress Test for ROOK TTRPG Application - ALL 72 TESTS PASSED. Backend API: 49/49 passed. Frontend E2E: 23/23 passed. All GM features (NPCs, Locations, Maps, Timeline, Gods, Combat, Notes, Custom Content) and Player features (Character creation, Character sheet, Navigation) working correctly.

minor.issue: Individual NPC GET endpoint returns 405 Method Not Allowed - must use list endpoint instead
Individual Location GET endpoint returns 405 Method Not Allowed - must use list endpoint instead

seed_data_creation: Used existing test campaign eabd4ae0-d1d8-40a5-858e-f7772af1d2ce with lcblakey24 admin user. Created and cleaned up test NPCs, Locations, Gods, Timeline events, Combat scenarios, Notes, and Characters during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive stress test completed successfully. All features tested: 1) GM Dashboard tabs navigation (World group: Setting, World Builder, Maps, Gods, Locations, NPCs, Chronicle; Combat group: Combat, Battle Maps; GM Tools: Tools, Inventory; Standalone: AI Recap, Players, Notes). 2) All CRUD operations for NPCs, Locations, Gods, Timeline events, Combat scenarios, Notes work. 3) Character API (create, get, update, delete) works. 4) Campaign content (custom races, classes, subclasses, backgrounds, feats) API works. 5) Calendar and Timeline events work. 6) Maps endpoints work. 7) Custom creatures and custom rules work. 8) Admin user (lcblakey24) has 'legendary' subscription tier. 9) Character Builder shows 5 steps (CONCEPT → DETAILS) with AI generation. 10) GM Screen opens in new tab from campaign dashboard.

features_tested: Home Dashboard - Player and GM sections display correctly
Campaign Dashboard - All tab groups display (World, Combat, GM Tools)
Campaign Settings Tab - AI World Context selector works
GM Screen - Opens in new tab from campaign dashboard
Character Builder - Navigation and step progression works
Account Settings - Profile and password sections display
Subscription - Admin has legendary tier (verified via API)
